builtin.incidentResponse.name: Incident Response (Generic)
builtin.incidentResponse.description: Standard IR workflow: detect, contain, eradicate, recover, and review.
builtin.incidentResponse.step1: Confirm incident and rule out false positive
builtin.incidentResponse.step7: Restore affected systems to normal operation
builtin.phishing.name: Phishing Investigation
builtin.phishing.description: Investigate a phishing campaign: analyze emails, check infrastructure, contain exposure.
builtin.phishing.step1: Analyze email headers and sender reputation
builtin.malware.name: Malware Analysis
builtin.malware.description: Analyze a malware sample: static analysis, dynamic analysis, IOC extraction, detection rules.
builtin.threatHunt.name: Threat Hunt
builtin.threatHunt.description: Hypothesis-driven threat hunting: form hypothesis, query data, analyze results.
builtin.dataBreach.name: Data Breach Investigation
builtin.dataBreach.description: Investigate a potential data breach: scope, classify, contain, notify.
builtin.dataBreach.step2: Preserve evidence and maintain chain of custody
builtin.vulnAssessment.name: Vulnerability Assessment
builtin.vulnAssessment.description: Assess and remediate a critical vulnerability across the environment.
picker.choosePlaybookNew: Choose a playbook to auto-populate your investigation with tasks, notes, and templates.
picker.choosePlaybookExisting: Choose a playbook to add its tasks, notes, and templates to this investigation.
